query: I will check and fold the load right after the dryer finishes so I need good light and a bit of humidity to prevent static and keep towels soft. At 4:28 PM, which is exactly 7 minutes after dryer 1 in the utility room finishes, turn on light 1 in the utility room and also turn on humidifier 1 in the bathroom and set the fan to a medium speed

steps.thought: I need to determine the current time and get the list of rooms to find utility room and bathroom devices. Then I need to schedule a workflow at 4:28 PM (7 minutes after dryer finishes) to turn on utility room light and turn on bathroom humidifier with medium fan speed.
I need to get all rooms and then explore utility_room for devices to confirm dryer, light, and bathroom humidifier.
I need to get devices in utility_room to find light 1 and dryer 1, and also bathroom to find humidifier 1.
I need to check the dryer's structure to see if it has an operational state with countdown time, so I can confirm completion time.

The dryer's countdownTime is 2630 seconds, predicting finish at 16:11:38, but the user asserts finishes at 4:21 PM (16:21:00) and 7 minutes later is 4:28 PM. I'll use the user-provided time 16:28:00. Next get bathroom devices.
I need to check the humidifier's structure to see what clusters and commands are available for fan speed control.

I need to verify the dryer's countdown time to confirm the finish time. The current countdown is 2630 seconds from 15:27:58, which predicts finish at 16:11:38, but the user says it finishes at 16:21:00. I'll get the current countdown attribute again to check if it changed. Then I'll schedule at 16:28:00 as per user's request.
Now I need to check the environment control rules for humidity to understand how to properly set the humidifier to medium speed.
